dictionary_sections.tzp_thesaurus:
\begin{enumerate}[leftmargin=1.6em,itemsep=6pt,topsep=4pt]
\item Canonical carrier: the relation used as the mathematical spine of the entry.
\item Source alignment: the cited source path that motivates the repaired section packet.
\item TRAWIN closure: the production interpretation through time, rotation, action, wave, integration, and normalization.
\end{enumerate}
